title: centaurea cineraria
intro: Centaurea cineraria, also known as Silver Dust or Dusty Miller, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems, which contain compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting antioxidant activity, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Centaurea cineraria can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in homeopathic medicine and aromatherapy.
